CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str String);

INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is a fast open-source OLAP data warehouse.'), (2, 'clickhouse is a fast open-source olap DATA WAREHOUSE.'), (3, 'Another Example String for Testing.'), (4, 'Different String for Hashing Test.'), (5, 'String for hashminhashfunction.'), (6, 'ClickHouse® is powerful!');
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(str) AS hashes FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(str, 1, 3) AS hashes FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(str, 5, 10) AS hashes FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(str, 25, 25) AS hashes FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(str, 15, 15) FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE id <= 3);
SELECT a.id, wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(a.str), wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(b.str) FROM test_strings AS a JOIN test_strings AS b ON a.id != b.id;
WITH (SELECT str FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) AS selected_string SELECT wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(selected_string, 2, 6) AS hashes;
WITH (SELECT str FROM test_strings LIMIT 3) AS limited_strings SELECT wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(arrayStringConcat(limited_strings), 3, 5) AS hashes;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitive(str, 3, 25) FROM test_strings WHERE length(str) > 20;
